{"projectId":"929484233158471895","sessionId":"15464363944166080087","outputComponents":[{"design":{"screens":[{"screenshot":{"name":"projects/929484233158471895/files/734e15e39bde4b319b27cc5f01970637","downloadUrl":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida/AP1WRLtuK6jlBjoS6KLhSMmg78VxGdL2YpPfCKPK8GgWfOUVl3AnFg1bPV7A_NzaOjv7KfsixvAfjtU3SiVRFlHVW9aoQ9FlSfPI6rVESKgKEY6YsSWxyvfwybuWWmXfIutBDdV4Xtgokgd-oauthh0mDjao8vYeAWdx24fj9uBjQj8lJ47VfNDncP0em7NjrIWnie9Z9GPtaNBHeB03ELB-EubvOjG6fBSrUk83N-2Qorz5lMWwYQWCPHC6_w"},"htmlCode":{"name":"projects/929484233158471895/files/b48f2eaeb64b4817bd327b330a9d9374","downloadUrl":"https://contribution.usercontent.google.com/download?c=CgthaWRhX2NvZGVmeBJ6Eh1hcHBfY29tcGFuaW9uX2dlbmVyYXRlZF9maWxlcxpZCiVodG1sXzk2ZjM2M2NkZThkZTQ5ZWRhYmZlNTk3M2FlZjYyNjRlEgsSBxCV1fjBpRoYAZIBIgoKcHJvamVjdF9pZBIUQhI5Mjk0ODQyMzMxNTg0NzE4OTU&filename=&opi=96797242","mimeType":"text/html"},"id":"367309a2a41d47769fec2984c9d371ee","generatedBy":"HatterAgent","width":"2560","height":"2048","title":"/ — Inicio (menu perfil abierto)","prompt":"Create a new screen based on {{DATA:SCREEN:SCREEN_12}} (the refined home screen).
Add a profile menu popup anchored ABOVE the bottom user profile row in the sidebar.

Menu requirements:
- Overlay panel positioned directly above the 'Diego Murillo Correa' section.
- White background, 1px border (#d5e8e0), rounded-md corner radius.
- Subtle shadow-md to distinguish the overlay.
- Three rows with simple line icons and text:
  1) 'Perfil' (with user icon)
  2) 'Configuración' (with settings icon)
  3) 'Cerrar sesión' (with logout icon)
- Thin 1px dividers between rows.
- Icons and text should use the secondary color or #05aba9.
- Hover state for menu items: soft mint (#d9eedb).
- The profile trigger row at the bottom should have a mint background (#d9eedb) to indicate it is active.

Maintain all other elements from {{DATA:SCREEN:SCREEN_12}}:
- Sidebar with official black rocket logo {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_25}}, 'Búsquedas anteriores' list.
- Centered headline: '¿Qué tipo de oportunidades/licitaciones estás buscando?'
- Search input with 'Pregunta a Leadiva' and teal button.
- NO 'Inicio'/'Oportunidades' nav tabs, NO suggestion chips, NO marketing footer.
- Language: Spanish.
- Design style: Flat Institutional Mint.","name":"projects/929484233158471895/screens/367309a2a41d47769fec2984c9d371ee","theme":{"colorMode":"LIGHT","customColor":"#05aba9","headlineFont":"IBM_PLEX_SANS","bodyFont":"IBM_PLEX_SANS","labelFont":"IBM_PLEX_SANS","colorVariant":"TONAL_SPOT"},"deviceType":"DESKTOP","screenType":"DESIGN","screenMetadata":{"agentType":"PRO_AGENT","status":"COMPLETE"},"designSystem":{"name":"assets/8031487489663830885","designSystem":{"displayName":"Leadiva Mint Pastel","theme":{"colorMode":"LIGHT","customColor":"#05aba9","headlineFont":"IBM_PLEX_SANS","bodyFont":"IBM_PLEX_SANS","labelFont":"IBM_PLEX_SANS","designMd":"# Leadiva Flat — Mint Pastel Palette (user-provided strip)

Exact hex from reference strip (left → right):
1. Soft coral #f9a79b
2. Light peach #fbcab9  ← companion LEFT of center
3. Pale mint #d9eedb   ← CENTER / brand core
4. Light aqua #9ce5de  ← companion RIGHT of center
5. Deep teal #05aba9   ← CTA / interactive (AA contrast)

## Role mapping
- Brand soft / selected / KPI accents / soft badges: #d9eedb (center mint)
- Warm companion (zebra tint, secondary soft panels, warm chips): #fbcab9
- Cool companion (secondary buttons, borders accent, tags): #9ce5de
- Primary CTA, links, active nav bar, focus ring: #05aba9 (deep teal from same strip)
- CTA hover: darken teal ≈ #048f8d
- Optional warm accent for soft coral status open: #f9a79b

## Surfaces
- surface.base: #f4faf6 (mint-tinted canvas)
- surface.raised: #ffffff
- surface.border: #d5e8e0

## Text
- text.primary: #1c1917
- text.secondary: #5f6b66

## Status
- open: #05aba9 (or soft fill #d9eedb + text #048f8d)
- evaluating: use warm peach text on soft #fbcab9
- won: #05aba9 / mint family
- lost: keep semantic red #dc2626
- expiring: soft coral #f9a79b border/text
- inactive: #a8a29e

## Rules
Flat Institutional. No blue, no purple, no coral-as-primary CTA.
Center the UI around mint #d9eedb with peach + aqua companions.
CTAs must use deep teal #05aba9 for white text contrast.
1px borders, no skeuomorphism.

Key highlights of this version:
- **Anchored Profile Menu**: Added a popup menu that opens upward from the user profile row. It features a clean white panel with subtle elevation, 1px dividers, and standard menu options (Perfil, Configuración, Cerrar sesión) as specified in the wireframe.
- **Active State Interaction**: The bottom profile row now reflects an active state with a soft mint background, providing visual feedback that the menu is triggered.
- **Visual Consistency**: Maintained the focused, centered layout of the "Ask Leadiva" interface and the official branding in the sidebar.
- **Institutional Styling**: Used a 1px border (#d5e8e0) and soft mint hover states to ensure the component feels native to the existing design system."},{"suggestion":"Cierra el menú de perfil"},{"suggestion":"Añade un estado de hover a una opción del menú"},{"suggestion":"Muestra el flujo de Configuración"}]}

theme.designMd:
# Leadiva Flat — Mint Pastel Palette (user-provided strip)

Exact hex from reference strip (left → right):
1. Soft coral #f9a79b
2. Light peach #fbcab9  ← companion LEFT of center
3. Pale mint #d9eedb   ← CENTER / brand core
4. Light aqua #9ce5de  ← companion RIGHT of center
5. Deep teal #05aba9   ← CTA / interactive (AA contrast)

## Role mapping
- Brand soft / selected / KPI accents / soft badges: #d9eedb (center mint)
- Warm companion (zebra tint, secondary soft panels, warm chips): #fbcab9
- Cool companion (secondary buttons, borders accent, tags): #9ce5de
- Primary CTA, links, active nav bar, focus ring: #05aba9 (deep teal from same strip)
- CTA hover: darken teal ≈ #048f8d
- Optional warm accent for soft coral status open: #f9a79b

## Surfaces
- surface.base: #f4faf6 (mint-tinted canvas)
- surface.raised: #ffffff
- surface.border: #d5e8e0

## Text
- text.primary: #1c1917
- text.secondary: #5f6b66

## Status
- open: #05aba9 (or soft fill #d9eedb + text #048f8d)
- evaluating: use warm peach text on soft #fbcab9
- won: #05aba9 / mint family
- lost: keep semantic red #dc2626
- expiring: soft coral #f9a79b border/text
- inactive: #a8a29e

## Rules
Flat Institutional. No blue, no purple, no coral-as-primary CTA.
Center the UI around mint #d9eedb with peach + aqua companions.
CTAs must use deep teal #05aba9 for white text contrast.
1px borders, no skeuomorphism.

screens.prompt:
Create a new screen based on {{DATA:SCREEN:SCREEN_12}} (the refined home screen).
Add a profile menu popup anchored ABOVE the bottom user profile row in the sidebar.

Menu requirements:
- Overlay panel positioned directly above the 'Diego Murillo Correa' section.
- White background, 1px border (#d5e8e0), rounded-md corner radius.
- Subtle shadow-md to distinguish the overlay.
- Three rows with simple line icons and text:
  1) 'Perfil' (with user icon)
  2) 'Configuración' (with settings icon)
  3) 'Cerrar sesión' (with logout icon)
- Thin 1px dividers between rows.
- Icons and text should use the secondary color or #05aba9.
- Hover state for menu items: soft mint (#d9eedb).
- The profile trigger row at the bottom should have a mint background (#d9eedb) to indicate it is active.

Maintain all other elements from {{DATA:SCREEN:SCREEN_12}}:
- Sidebar with official black rocket logo {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_25}}, 'Búsquedas anteriores' list.
- Centered headline: '¿Qué tipo de oportunidades/licitaciones estás buscando?'
- Search input with 'Pregunta a Leadiva' and teal button.
- NO 'Inicio'/'Oportunidades' nav tabs, NO suggestion chips, NO marketing footer.
- Language: Spanish.
- Design style: Flat Institutional Mint.
screens.title: / — Inicio (menu perfil abierto)

outputComponents.text:
I've added the profile menu interaction to the home screen, strictly following the wireframe and the **Leadiva Mint** institutional style.

Key highlights of this version:
- **Anchored Profile Menu**: Added a popup menu that opens upward from the user profile row. It features a clean white panel with subtle elevation, 1px dividers, and standard menu options (Perfil, Configuración, Cerrar sesión) as specified in the wireframe.
- **Active State Interaction**: The bottom profile row now reflects an active state with a soft mint background, providing visual feedback that the menu is triggered.
- **Visual Consistency**: Maintained the focused, centered layout of the "Ask Leadiva" interface and the official branding in the sidebar.
- **Institutional Styling**: Used a 1px border (#d5e8e0) and soft mint hover states to ensure the component feels native to the existing design system.

outputComponents.suggestion: Añade un estado de hover a una opción del menú
